headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: astron-agent
projects.description: Enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly agentic workflow platform for building next-generation SuperAgents.
projects.summaryZh: Enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly agentic workflow platform for building next-generation SuperAgents. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: OpenSandbox
projects.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.
projects.summaryZh: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: omlx
projects.description: LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar
projects.summaryZh: LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: milvus
projects.description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search
projects.summaryZh: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: evalscope
projects.description: A streamlined and customizable framework for efficient large model (LLM, VLM, AIGC) evaluation and performance benchmarking.
projects.summaryZh: A streamlined and customizable framework for efficient large model (LLM, VLM, AIGC) evaluation and performance benchmarking. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: FastVideo
projects.description: A unified inference and post-training framework for accelerated video generation.
projects.summaryZh: A unified inference and post-training framework for accelerated video generation. 这是偏视频理解或生成方向的项目，适合跟踪多模态内容处理能力。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: FastDeploy
projects.description: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle
projects.summaryZh: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
